--- gmax1@mindspring.com wrote:

Can I meet them and just put this stupidity to rest
G

-----Original Message-----
From: Adam Bly bly@seedmediagroup.com
Date: Fri, 22 Sep 2006 08:00:45
To:Ghislaine Maxwell gmax1@mindspring.com
Subject: Chrysalis

Pretty amazing conference!
Do you have 10 minutes today to speak with Chrysalis
Ventures (the
firm in Kentucky investing $2M)? They want to speak
with the other
investors and have already spoken with Walnut and
Innovium. I think
that in your case they will want to hear that
Jeffrey remains engaged
in the investment and is not participating in this
follow-on round
because of personal circumstances. Let me know your
availability and
best number to reach you and I will have them call
you.
Adam
